creator: Olivier.Girard@univ-angers.fr
text:
Edwin Groothuis a écrit :
> Maintainer of mail/p5-MIME-Charset,
>
> Please note that PR ports/141592 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/141592
>
>   
Ok for me, feel free to upgrade this port.

-- 
Olivier Girard
Service Systèmes et Réseaux de l'Université d'Angers.
